title: Welcome to Yogini Arts
subtitle: Discover the sacred artistry of Thangka paintings and the healing resonance of Tibetan sound bowls
heroText: Bring the ancient art of filmmaking and the healing power of the mountains into your space.
singingBowlDesc: Experience the healing resonance of our handcrafted singing bowls, designed for meditation and mindfulness.
aboutTitle: Yogini Arts – Sacred Art & Sound Experience Platform
aboutSubtitle: A beautifully crafted experience showcasing authentic Himalayan art and sound-healing culture from Nepal

thangka.title: The Art of Thangka
thangka.description: Traditional Tibetan Buddhist art form known for its sacred symbolism, precise craftsmanship, and spiritual significance. Explore authentic hand-painted Thangka artworks from Nepal.

sound.title: The Sound of Healing
sound.description: Specially engraved, artisan-crafted sound bowls designed for meditation and healing practices. Experience the healing power of meticulously crafted Tibetan singing bowls.

sacred.title: Sacred Items & Spiritual Connection
sacred.description: Discover meaningful sacred objects and spiritual artifacts, each carefully sourced from experienced Nepalese artisans with cultural significance and authenticity.

thangka.title: Thangka Art
thangka.description: Explore authentic hand-painted Thangka artworks from Nepal, each piece rich with spiritual symbolism and traditional craftsmanship.

soundBowls.title: Sound Bowls
soundBowls.description: Experience the healing power of artisan-crafted Tibetan singing bowls, meticulously engraved for meditation and sound therapy.

sacredItems.title: Sacred Items
sacredItems.description: Discover meaningful sacred objects and spiritual artifacts, each carefully sourced from experienced Nepalese artisans.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with us to learn more about our collection, inquire about custom pieces, or schedule a consultation.

testimonials.name: Singing Bowls
testimonials.quote: Hand-hammered bowls with deep, balanced resonance for meditation and sound healing.

testimonials.name: Thangka Art
testimonials.quote: Hand-painted sacred artworks created using traditional iconography and proportions.

testimonials.name: Sacred Ornaments
testimonials.quote: Artisan-crafted adornments carrying symbolic meaning drawn from Himalayan spiritual culture.

section4.headline: A Journey from the Himalayas to Your Space
section4.supportingText: Born in the Himalayan region, each creation carries the stillness, depth, and spirit of its origin—bringing a sense of calm and authenticity into modern spaces.
